name: Koinly
description: Koinly — Crypto tax software for investors with 20+ country support, staking and DeFi coverage

seo.title: Koinly — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Koinly: Koinly — Crypto tax software for investors with 20+ country support, staking and DeFi coverage

when_to_use: Crypto capital gains reporting for investors in 20+ tax jurisdictions
DeFi staking and yield income tracking for compliant tax returns
Portfolio cost-basis and P&L calculation across exchanges and wallets
CSV and API-based crypto tax report generation for accountants

pros: Supports 20+ countries with local tax forms
Clean UX compared to most crypto tax tools
Fair pricing tied to transaction volume
cons: Exchange sync occasionally breaks on API changes
Complex DeFi still needs manual tweaks
Limited human support on lower tiers
review.verdict: One of the most usable crypto tax apps for retail investors across many countries.
review.best_for: Individual crypto investors wanting polished UX and local tax reports in many jurisdictions.
review.not_for: Exchanges, funds, or institutions needing audit-grade controls and SLAs.
